description: Prolonged aridification event. Implicated in collapse of Akkadian Empire, Old Kingdom Egypt, Indus Valley civilisation
Multi-decade drought contributing to Bronze Age Collapse. Pollen and isotope evidence from Cyprus and Syria
Warm stable climate correlating with Roman and Han Dynasty peaks. Agricultural surplus supported population growth
Volcanic winters from 536 CE eruptions caused crop failures globally. Coincides with Justinianic Plague and multiple empire weakening
Warm period enabling agricultural expansion. Correlates with population growth in Europe and the Islamic Golden Age
Extended cooling causing crop failures and famines across multiple continents. Contributed to 17th century general crisis
Mount Tambora eruption 1815 caused global cooling. Crop failures across Europe and North America. Context for post-Napoleonic instability
Smallpox or measles pandemic killing 5-10M in Roman Empire. Marked beginning of Roman demographic decline
Unknown pathogen killing 5000/day at peak in Rome. Contributed to Crisis of the Third Century
First major bubonic plague pandemic. Killed 25-50M. Devastated Byzantine and Sassanid empires simultaneously
Bubonic plague killed 30-60% of European population and devastated Middle East and Central Asia. Travelled Mongol trade routes
Smallpox, measles, influenza killed 50-90% of indigenous American populations. Directly enabled Spanish conquest of Aztec and Inca
50-100M deaths globally. Struck at end of WWI contributing to political instability and empire collapses
Mass migrations and raids destroyed Hittites, Ugarit, Mycenae. Egypt survived barely. Core event of Bronze Age Collapse
Hun westward push displaced Germanic tribes into Roman territory. Directly contributed to Western Roman collapse
Largest land empire conquest in history. Destroyed Abbasid Caliphate, Jin Dynasty, Song Dynasty, Kievan Rus
Simultaneous collapse of nearly every major Bronze Age civilisation. Multi-causal: drought, migration, trade disruption, internal revolt
Devastated Central Europe. Holy Roman Empire lost up to 8M people. Began HRE terminal decline
17-20M dead. Destroyed Ottoman, Austro-Hungarian, Russian, and German Empires simultaneously. Most destructive collapse cluster in modern history
70-85M dead. Destroyed German, Italian, Japanese empires. Fatally weakened British and French colonial empires
